title: dieteria canescens var. canescens
intro: Dieteria canescens var. canescens, also known as Whitestem Globe Gilia or Whitestem Gilia, is a perennial plant in the phlox family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant has various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, and soothing skin irritations. Dieteria canescens var. canescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
